title: athyrium filix-femina f. elatius
intro: Athyrium filix-femina f. elatius, also known as the Lady fern or Elwes' lady fern, is a variant of the common lady fern plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium filix-femina f. elatius include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting the respiratory system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion to create herbal teas and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
